commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /home/ec2-user/platform && nohup setsid bash -c "npx tsx scripts/runners/run-pilot3.ts --config config-stage3-claude-shard-a.yaml > data/stage3-claude-a.log 2>&1; EXIT=\$?; echo \"=== Claude Stage3 Shard A finished exit=\$EXIT at \$(date -u) ===\" >> data/stage3-claude-a.log; if [ \$EXIT -eq 0 ]; then bash scripts/data-pipeline/experiment-upload.sh stage3-claude-shard-a ./data/stage3-claude-shard-a >> data/stage3-claude-a.log 2>&1; fi" </dev/null > /dev/null 2>&1 & disown; sleep 3; ps -ef | grep -v grep | grep -c run-pilot3; echo launched at \$(date -u)'
